Brazilian Modernism Styleguide

Doctrine: Curva & Concreto

Typography

Modernist rhythm. Generous line-heights. Tracked caps for labels.

Heading 1: Bossa Nova

Heading 2: Athos Bulcão

Heading 3: Volpi

This is standard paragraph text. It has generous line-height to make reading comfortable, simulating the breathability of modernist architecture.

This is tracked caps text, suitable for small labels or badges.

Colors

Background
#F4EFE4
Surface
#EAE2CE
Accent (Volpi Red)
#C2281F
Azul (Focus/Info)
#1F6FA8
Ouro (Warning)
#D8A43A
Verde (Success)
#3F7A4E

Components

Buttons (Curve)

Parabolic curves for UI chrome.

Badges (Concrete)

Sharp geometry for data.

Info Badge Warning Badge Success Badge

Cards & Patterns (Concrete + Athos Bulcão)

Sharp geometry for containers, with subtle CSS patterns.

Standard Card

Plain surface card with sharp corners.

Normal

Triangles Pattern

Card with Bulcão triangles pattern in background.

Stripes Pattern

Card with Bulcão stripes pattern in background.

Warning

Half-moons Pattern

Card with Bulcão half-moons pattern in background.

Success
